name: medfriend-mcp-servers
description: Integrity-pinned MCP server(s) that MedFriend launches over stdio. Installed with `npm ci` from the committed lockfile so npx cannot pull an unpinned/tampered release. The `overrides` block forces @modelcontextprotocol/sdk forward from the vulnerable 1.0.1 that the archived server-google-maps@0.6.2 pins, patching GHSA-8r9q-7v3j-jr4g (ReDoS), GHSA-w48q-cv73-mx4w (DNS rebinding), and the cross-client data-leak advisory.
